back_translation: Therefore, I, who am a prisoner in Lord Jesus, urge you to live a life worthy of the calling that you have received
With all humility and gentleness, with patience, bearing with one another in love
Striving to preserve the unity of the Spirit in the bond of peace
There is one body and one Spirit, just as you have been called in one hope of your calling
There is one Lord, one faith, one baptism
There is one God and Father of all, who is over all things, who works through all things, and who dwells in all things
But this grace has been given to each one of us, according to the measure of the gift of Lord Christ
Therefore there is a saying — ‘When He ascended on high, He led captives away as captives, and gave gifts to humans’
But what does the word ‘ascended’ mean, except that He also descended down to the lower parts of the earth
He who descended is the same one who ascended above all the heavens, in order that He may fill all things
And He Himself has given some to be apostles, some to be prophets, some to be evangelists, and some to be pastors and teachers
In order to prepare the saints for works of ministry, in order to build up the body of Lord Christ
Until we all reach unity in faith and in true knowledge concerning the Son of God; reaching mature completeness, reaching the measure of the fullness of Lord Christ
So that we may no longer be infants, tossed about by waves and carried about by every wind of teaching, by the cunning of humans, with deceit that leads to schemes of error
But when we speak truth in love, we will grow up in all things into Him who is the head, that is, Lord Christ

From Him, the whole body is fitted together and bound together by every joint that nourishes, according to the working in measure of each individual part, so that the body grows and builds itself up in love
Therefore, I say and affirm in Lord Jesus that you must not live in the way that the Gentiles live in the emptiness of their thinking
They have darkened thinking, are separated from the life of God, because of the ignorance that is in them, because of the hardness of their hearts
Who, having become numb-of-feeling, have given themselves over to lustful sensuality, in order to do every kind of impurity with greed
But you yourselves did not learn Lord Christ in that way
If indeed you have heard Him, and have been taught in Him, according to the truth that is in Lord Jesus
That you should throw off the old man according to your former way of life, which is being corrupted according to deceitful desires
May He renew you anew in the spirit of your mind
And put on the new man, who has been created according to the likeness of God, in true righteousness and holiness
Therefore, having thrown off falsehood, let each of you speak truth to his own neighbor, because we are all members of one another
‘Be angry, but do not sin’; do not let the sun set while you are still resentful
And do not give an opportunity to the devil
He who used to steal must stop stealing; but rather, let him toil and work with his own hands, doing what is good, in order that he may have something to share with the one who is in need
Let no rotten word come out of your mouths; but let only good word come out, in order to build up according to the need, in order to bring grace to those who hear
And do not cause the Holy Spirit of God to be sorrowful in heart; by that Spirit, you have been sealed for the day of redemption
Throw out from yourselves all bitterness, rage, anger, shouting, and slander, together with all malice
Have kindness and tender-heartedness toward one another; forgive one another, just as God has forgiven you in Lord Christ
